intro: This archive contains 36 articles from April 12 to April 20, 2026, tracking Microsoft-related security developments. The coverage details activity from the threat actor Storm-2755 and patches for vulnerabilities including CVE-2026-33104, CVE-2026-34054, CVE-2026-26179, CVE-2026-32183, and CVE-2026-32201. The reported incidents, which include 5 critical and 17 high-severity items, had a global impact with noted activity in Canada and Japan. Affected sectors were multiple and cross-sector, specifically involving education, enterprise, and federal government entities.
